description_long: This is a classic wooden chessboard with a folding design, featuring a checkered playing surface of alternating light and dark brown squares. The board is surrounded by a medium-width wooden border, which is slightly darker than the lighter squares and has visible wood grain patterns. The chessboard is set up for play, with both light and dark chess pieces arranged in their starting positions, and a few pieces scattered off the board, suggesting an ongoing game. The chess pieces are traditional Staunton-style, crafted from matching light and dark wood, with distinct shapes for each type. The board's surface is smooth and polished, reflecting a subtle sheen under light. The border includes alphanumeric coordinates etched or printed in gold, aiding in move notation.
description: A polished wooden chessboard with a checkered pattern and Staunton-style chess pieces, bordered by a darker wood frame with gold coordinates. Several chess pieces are positioned on and around the board, indicating active play.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from above and slightly to the side, showing both the playing surface and several chess pieces off the board to the left and right.
description_view_1: This view faces the board from the black pieces' side, highlighting the arrangement of black pieces and a fallen light pawn in the foreground.
description_view_2: Seen from the white pieces' side, this angle shows the white pieces' setup and two black pieces off the board to the right.
description_view_3: A direct view from the side of the board, focusing on the white pieces and two black pieces in the foreground, with the board's border and coordinates visible.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features an 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark brown squares, each square being perfectly square-shaped and arranged in a classic checkered pattern. The border is a darker wood with visible grain, and gold alphanumeric coordinates are inscribed along the edges for notation.
attribute_border_design: The border is made of a darker, polished wood with a medium width, featuring visible wood grain and gold alphanumeric coordinates (letters and numbers) etched or printed along the edges. The border is smooth and slightly raised compared to the playing surface, with no additional ornamentation.
